title: User Registration with Valid Email and Password
description: Verify that a new user can register successfully with valid email, password, and required details.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Enter valid email, full name, phone number, password, and select role (jobSeeker or recruiter).
Submit registration form.
Check registration is successful and user receives confirmation email if applicable.
Verify user can login immediately after registration.

title: User Registration with Duplicate Email
description: Verify that registration fails when attempting to register with an email that already exists.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Enter an email address that is already registered.
Fill other fields with valid data.
Submit the registration form.
Ensure the application displays an error message about duplicate email.
Verify that user is not registered again.

title: Successful Login with Registered User
description: Verify that user can login with correct email and password and receive valid JWT token.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter valid registered email and password.
Click login button.
Verify login is successful and JWT token is received and stored for authenticated sessions.

title: Login Failure with Incorrect Password
description: Verify that login fails with an incorrect password and proper error message is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter registered email and incorrect password.
Click login button.
Verify login fails with an error message indicating invalid credentials.

title: Password Reset Flow - Request Reset Link
description: Verify that users can successfully initiate password reset and receive an email with reset link.

steps.description: Navigate to the forgot password page.
Enter registered email address.
Submit forgot password request.
Check that an email with the password reset link is sent to the user.

title: Password Reset Flow - Reset Password Using Valid Token
description: Verify that user can reset password successfully using a valid password reset token.

steps.description: Navigate to the reset password page using valid reset password link.
Enter new password and confirm password.
Submit the reset password form.
Verify user password is updated and user is able to login with new password.

title: Password Reset Flow - Reset Password Using Invalid or Expired Token
description: Verify that password reset fails if the reset token is invalid or expired and proper error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to reset password page with invalid or expired token.
Attempt to reset password.
Check that the application shows an error message indicating invalid or expired token and does not allow reset.

title: Job Seeker: Upload Valid Resume and AI Parsing
description: Verify that job seeker can upload a valid resume file (PDF, DOC, DOCX) and the AI-powered parsing extracts and displays correct candidate information.

steps.description: Navigate to profile or resume upload section.
Upload a valid resume in PDF format containing education, skills, and experience.
Verify that AI-powered resume analysis extracts education, skills, experience, certifications and displays parsed data accurately.
Repeat upload with DOC and DOCX files.
Confirm parsing success and correct details extraction for all supported file formats.

title: Job Seeker: Upload Invalid Resume Format
description: Verify that uploading an unsupported or corrupted resume file results in a graceful error.

steps.description: Attempt to upload a resume file with unsupported format (e.g. .txt, .exe)
Ensure an error message is displayed indicating invalid file format.
Attempt to upload a corrupted or unreadable resume file.
Verify the system handles the error without crashing and notifies user.

title: Job Seeker: Browse Jobs with Filters
description: Verify that job seekers can view and filter job listings correctly by location, salary, experience, job type, and skills.

steps.description: Navigate to job listing page.
Apply filters like location, minimum salary, experience level, job type, and required skills.
Verify displayed jobs match filter criteria.
Clear filters.
Verify all jobs are shown again.

title: Job Seeker: Save and Unsave Jobs
description: Verify that job seekers can save jobs to favorites and remove them successfully.

steps.description: Browse job listings and save a job.
Verify that the job appears in the saved jobs list.
Unsave the previously saved job.
Confirm the job is removed from saved jobs list.

title: Job Seeker: Apply for a Job Successfully
description: Verify that a job seeker can apply for a job using their uploaded resume and the application is recorded.

steps.description: Navigate to a job detail page.
Click on apply button using uploaded resume.
Verify application is submitted successfully and appears in applied jobs list.

title: Job Seeker: Attempt Application Without Resume Upload
description: Verify the system prevents job application if no resume is uploaded and prompts the user appropriately.

steps.description: Attempt to apply for a job without uploading any resume.
Verify that application is blocked with an error or prompt to upload a resume.

title: Recruiter: Create New Job Listing with AI Job Analysis
description: Verify recruiter can create a new job listing and the AI-powered job description analysis extracts requirements correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to post job form.
Enter complete job details including title, description, company, location, skills required, experience, degree, certificates, etc.
Submit job posting form.
Verify job is created and AI analysis has extracted job requirements and attributes correctly.

title: Recruiter: Edit Existing Job Listing
description: Verify recruiter can edit and update job listings and changes are saved successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to recruiter job management page.
Select a job and modify details such as description, salary, or expiry date.
Submit updates.
Verify job listing is updated and changes persist.

title: Recruiter: Close a Job Posting
description: Verify a recruiter can mark a job as closed and the job is no longer open for applications.

steps.description: Navigate to recruiter job listings.
Mark a job as closed using appropriate UI control.
Verify job status changes to closed and applications are disabled for that job.

title: Recruiter: View Applicants and Matching Scores
description: Verify recruiter can view all applicants for a job and AI-generated detailed candidate-job matching scores and summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to job applicants page for a specific open job.
Verify list of applicants is displayed with attached resumes.
Select an applicant to view detailed AI matching scores and summary comments.
Confirm overall score and detailed scores match expected formats and are accurate.

title: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify that pages, API endpoints, and actions are restricted based on user roles (jobSeeker or recruiter).

steps.description: Login as a job seeker and attempt to access recruiter-only pages and APIs.
Verify access is denied with appropriate unauthorized messages.
Login as a recruiter and attempt to access job seeker only pages (like applied jobs or saved jobs).
Verify access is denied appropriately.

title: AI Assistant: Request Job Search Help
description: Verify that job seekers can use the AI assistant to get job search help and receive meaningful responses.

steps.description: Navigate to AI assistant interface.
Submit job search queries or requests for interview tips.
Verify the system returns helpful AI-generated assistance promptly.

title: Company Profile Management by Recruiter
description: Verify that recruiters can create, update, and view company profiles and associate jobs with companies.

steps.description: Navigate to company creation form.
Create a company profile with required details.
Verify the company is created and visible in company listings.
Edit the created company profile.
Confirm changes are saved and reflected.
Post a job and associate it with the created company.
Verify job shows correct company association.

title: API Endpoint Security and Load Handling
description: Verify all API endpoints enforce authentication, authorization, input validation and respond correctly under simulated high load.

steps.description: Call each API endpoint without authentication and verify access is denied.
Call each API endpoint with valid JWT and verify proper responses.
Perform calls with invalid, expired JWT and verify rejection.
Simulate high concurrent load on critical endpoints (login, job search, resume upload) and monitor API latency.
Ensure API latency is under 2 seconds and no errors due to load.

title: User Profile Management - Edit Profile and Change Password
description: Verify users can successfully update profile information and change their password securely.

steps.description: Login and navigate to profile edit page.
Edit profile fields such as full name, phone number, and profile picture.
Submit changes and verify updates persist.
Navigate to change password page.
Enter old password and new password, then submit.
Verify password is changed and user can login using the new password.

title: Performance: Page Load Time under 3 Seconds
description: Verify that critical frontend pages (Dashboard, Job Listings, Job Details) load within 3 seconds under normal network conditions.

steps.description: Open major frontend pages: DashboardPage, JobListingPage, JobDetailsPage.
Measure page load time and confirm it is under 3 seconds.

title: Security: Input Sanitization and Validation on All User Inputs
description: Verify the application sanitizes and validates all user inputs to prevent injection attacks and malformed data.

steps.description: Attempt to submit inputs with scripts, SQL injections, and special characters in forms like registration, job posting, and resume upload.
Ensure inputs are sanitized, invalid entries are rejected and no backend errors or security breaches occur.
